title: GPA (Grade Point Average) Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate your cumulative GPA from courses, credit hours, and letter grades, instantly in your browser.
shortDescription: Add your courses, credit hours, and grades to calculate cumulative GPA.

guideSections.heading: Why Credit Hours, Not Just Grades, Determine GPA
guideSections.body: GPA is a weighted average, not a simple average of grade points — a 4-credit course with a B carries more weight in the final calculation than a 1-credit course with an A. Two students with identical letter grades can end up with different GPAs if their credit hour distributions differ.

guideSections.heading: Why This Uses the Standard 4.0 Scale
guideSections.body: This calculator uses the most common US grading scale where A=4.0 down to F=0.0 in standard increments. Some institutions use different scales or weight honors/AP courses differently — check your institution's specific scale if you need to match an official transcript exactly.
